---
title: 'Button-Hole Earrings'
date: '2012-06-11T04:21:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_type: 'PAGE'
blogger_blog: 'TEST TCC'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_page_id: '1287322313164361621'
blogger_filename: '/p/button-hole-earrings.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/TEST TCC/feed.atom'
---

<div style="text-align: center;">
<span style="font-family: 'Courier New', Courier, monospace; font-size: large;">Here are the earrings currently available:</span></div>
<div style="background-color: white; color: black; text-align: center;">
<span style="background-color: #660000; color: white; font-family: 'Courier New', Courier, monospace; font-size: large;"><br />
</span></div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0350-d06d524dbb59.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0350-5103188f46f9.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0352-a-3a0568526b28.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0352-a-55820f948eba.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0353-e62e11977d5c.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0353-acdbfe2f27b6.jpg" width="240" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0357-a-456e3fd584e7.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0357-a-b17a8fd4c179.jpg" width="274" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0361-a577a85f6e37.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="275" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0361-c7ca028a2fa2.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0373-c58d66e93f08.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0373-d5fb63a2557d.jpg" width="303" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0364-56bd5636a109.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0364-6d2e3f44f79c.jpg" width="240" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0379-1817f9b6687e.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0379-f12b3ebc5f68.jpg" width="240" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0382-ebc9ea20603e.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0382-0b8e932e0e93.jpg" width="240" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0387-66ec1e1414f8.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0387-3925ac362966.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0388-e4c6f84ad040.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0388-2a81d8641761.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0390-b7b39264d3e1.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0390-36be9b06f60e.jpg" width="240" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
</div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
</div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0393-968659aa2277.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0393-4a182f18dd34.jpg" width="240" /></a></div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0396-ff7c9297bfcc.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0396-8591cd652458.jpg" width="311" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0399-8df28dec9e06.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0399-f1b1055aad79.jpg" width="240" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
</div>
<div style="text-align: center;">
<span style="background-color: white;"></span></div>
